title: braidnnn's resource pack
description: Foliage, grass & water changes to make the game easier on the eyes. Autumn and summer variants.
body:
## leaves

I've made the following adjustments to how leaves work.
- oak, dark oak, and jungle leaves will change per biome, as they do in vanilla
  - in the autumn pack, they'll appear orange-to-brownish
  - in the summer pack, they'll appear green
- dark oak leaves are now brighter than oak (in vanilla, they are the same brightness)
- acacia and mangrove leaves no longer change per biome; their colors persist
- spruce and birch leaves are warmed
- cherry leaves & pink petals are adjusted
  - in the autumn pack, they'll appear red
  - in the summer pack, they'll appear pink

The screenshots below indicate how each leaf block now appears. I've lined them up to create a sort of "gradient" that I keep in mind when using the foliage.

### autumn:
![autumn pack leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24f6cc618f700a88bb47b17dd2506b9efc13ed9a.png)

### summer:
![main pack leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e89ac900bb89a9d44b827a6057591ad46d9bb94.png)

## other foliage & water

Many other plants are desaturated and darkened, as is the water. A few other notable changes:
- ferns are a persistent bright green
- tall ferns appear as a taller spruce sapling
- spruce, birch and acacia saplings match their respective leaves
- firefly bushes no longer blink

I intend to keep adding more texture changes, especially that of the other saplings and flowers.

![plant showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05881209b2c8a2566e94e2d3410451d038cc65bf_0.webp)

### Feel free to integrate the full resource pack into your own modpacks, but please don't rip individual textures from it and put those in your own published pack! <3
